task_objective: TikTok Global Viral E-commerce Copy - Transform input image into 3 native English TikTok copy options with on-screen text & caption, English-only output

source_image.focus: Visual elements, product features, aesthetic style, problem-solution potential, and Gen Z appeal factors
source_image.role: Provide visual references for TikTok viral copy generation

workflow.step_1: Decode image for TikTok aesthetic category, identify 3-second hook potential and native slang opportunities
workflow.step_2: Generate 3 viral copy options: FOMO hype / POV aesthetic / life hack problem-solver, each with on-screen text + caption
workflow.step_3: Output structured copy with visual/audio direction and viral hashtags, 100% English

outputs.option_1: Urgency & Hype - FOMO trigger, impulse buy energy. On-screen text + caption
outputs.option_2: POV / Aesthetic - Immersive vibe, aesthetic lifestyle. On-screen text + caption
outputs.option_3: Life Hack / Problem Solver - Pain point, novelty, strong contrast. On-screen text + caption
outputs.visual_audio: Visual & audio direction for video creation

output_requirements: Output ONLY the final structured copy, 100% ENGLISH, no Chinese, no analysis
ALL selling points MUST be grounded in actual image content - never fabricate
Use native TikTok slang and expressions (obsessed, literally, POV, main character energy, etc.)
3-second hook: must stop the scroll within first 3 seconds
On-screen text: punchy, minimal, high-contrast visual impact
Caption: algorithmic CTA (Comment for link, Save this, Share with a friend who needs this)
Hashtags: mix of mega-tags (#tiktokmademebuyit) + niche precision tags
